text: Standing outside the glass-walled room, I feel anticipation mixed with a slight sense of distance. The room’s transparency invites curiosity but the closed doors imply separation. When I move into the exhibit space, vibrant colors and interactive screens ignite my contemplative mind. The wall’s message about research, innovation, and coexistence triggers thoughts about the symbiosis of technology and humanity. I feel intellectually stimulated, aware of being in a place where ideas evolve and boundaries blur.
